Legal

Terms of service

Please read these terms carefully before using Dracon.

Effective: January 1, 2024

By using Dracon ("the Bot", "the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use Dracon.

1. Acceptance of terms

By adding Dracon to your Discord server or using any of its features, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to these Terms of Service, as well as our Privacy Policy.

2. Eligibility

You must be at least 13 years old to use Dracon, in accordance with Discord's Terms of Service. By using Dracon, you represent that you meet this requirement. Server administrators are responsible for ensuring their use of Dracon complies with applicable laws.

3. Permitted use

Dracon may be used for lawful purposes only. You agree not to use Dracon to:

  • Harass, abuse, or harm other users.
  • Violate Discord's Terms of Service or Community Guidelines.
  • Engage in illegal activities of any kind.
  • Attempt to reverse-engineer, exploit, or compromise our systems.
  • Spam or abuse bot commands in a way that degrades service for others.
  • Distribute malware, phishing links, or harmful content.

4. Premium services

Dracon offers premium subscription tiers with additional features. By subscribing to a paid plan:

  • You agree to pay the specified subscription fee.
  • Payments are processed securely and are non-refundable except as required by law.
  • You may cancel your subscription at any time; access continues until the end of the billing period.
  • We reserve the right to modify pricing with 30 days notice.

5. Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access to Dracon for any user or server that violates these terms, engages in abuse, or poses a risk to the platform's integrity. Termination may occur without prior notice in severe cases.

6. Disclaimer of warranties

Dracon is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of harmful components. Use of Dracon is at your own risk.

7. Limitation of liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Dracon and its creators shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the service, including data loss, moderation errors, or service interruptions.

8. Changes to terms

We may update these Terms of Service at any time. We will announce significant changes in our Discord support server. Continued use of Dracon after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

9. Governing law

These terms are governed by applicable law. Any disputes shall be resolved through good-faith negotiation. If unresolved, disputes may be subject to binding arbitration.

10. Contact

For questions about these terms, contact us at legal@dracon.bot or join our Discord support server.

Built with ♥ by the Dracon team — © 2024 Dracon.
